title: amaryllis × atrorubens
intro: Amaryllis × atrorubens, also known as the Dutch Master or Double Dutch, is a hybrid flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Amaryllis × atrorubens has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tinctures, capsules, and teas, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
